Mtn For Hrg On Deft Knox Violations 1003-1020
Off Calendar Jul-22-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court's tentative ruling instructed parties to appear at hearing. There being no appearances by parties at hearing, the Court ordered as follows: PLAINTIFF RONALD JOHNSON'S Motion For Hearing On Defendant Knox Violations 1003-1020 is taken off calendar. Judge Pro Tem: Sanford Kingsley, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-06-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS JAMES JOHNSON, JEANELL JOHNSON and ASHLEY KNOX's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. Complaint states no cause of action and no possibility of amendment. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-01-2015 Continued To Jul-06-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JAMES JOHNSON, JEANELL JOHNSON and ASHLEY KNOX's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Continued to July 6, 2015. Opposing party is ordered to provide courtesy copy of opposition to Department 501 no later than July 1, 2015 by 9:30 a.m. with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported (D501)

Mtn For Hrg On Deft Knox Violations 1003-1020
Off Calendar Jun-05-2015 Continued To Jul-22-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The hearing on the motion to compel (titled "Hearing on Defendant Knox Violations 1003-1020") is continued to July 22, 2015 at 9:00 am in Dept. 301 to be heard after the Demurrer. The Court advances the hearing date on the Demurrer, filed on March 16, 2015 and currently set for hearing on September 8, 2015 in Dept. 302, to July 1, 2015 at 9:30 am in Dept. 501. Both parties must deliver courtesy copies of the demurrer papers filed to Department 501, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than June 15, 2015.

Judge Pro Tem: Robert Kane. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
